title: M9: MVP Polish + Documentation
description: Package the implemented slices into a usable MVP with docs, examples, help, and tests.
acceptance_criteria: A new user can follow docs to complete one full task lifecycle without a daemon.

title: M8: Failure, Retry, and Recovery Hardening
description: Harden failure states, retries, logs, worktree diagnostics, and status projections for daily use.
acceptance_criteria: common failure/recovery scenarios are safe, retryable, and visible in status.

title: M7: Batch Scheduling with run-ready
description: Launch multiple ready tasks under operator confirmation and global concurrency limits.
acceptance_criteria: run-ready previews and launches up to N safe tasks without duplicate scheduling.

title: M6: PR Polling + Merge Sync
description: Poll PR state with gh and close Beads tasks when PRs are merged.
acceptance_criteria: task sync --all creates missing PRs, polls open PRs, and closes tasks for merged PRs.

title: M5: Single Task PR Creation
description: Turn a PR-ready run into a GitHub pull request through `task sync <task-id>`.
acceptance_criteria: task sync pushes the branch, creates one PR via gh, stores pr_url, and is idempotent.

title: M4: Agent Context + Completion + Orpheus Commit
description: Provide backend-neutral agent context and let agents complete work through an Orpheus-owned commit handshake.
acceptance_criteria: agent context returns task instructions; agent done validates context, commits changes, and marks the run PR-ready.

title: M3: Agent Profiles + Single Task Dispatch
description: Claim one task, create/recover its worktree, and launch a configured named shell-command agent.
acceptance_criteria: task run launches a named agent in the deterministic worktree with ORPHEUS_* env and captured logs.

title: M2: Global Task Visibility
description: List Beads tasks across registered repos and present a local global action queue.
acceptance_criteria: task list, task ready, and status work across all registered repos without GitHub/network calls.

title: M1: Repo Registry + Beads Discovery
description: Register repositories, detect Beads mode/prefix, and create the human-editable global Orpheus state layout.
acceptance_criteria: repo add/list/beads-dir work for local and global Beads modes; duplicate prefixes are rejected.

title: Finalize MVP manual validation checklist and release notes
description: Document final validation scenarios and known MVP limitations.
acceptance_criteria: Checklist covers full lifecycle, failures, and no-daemon operation.

title: Add integration test harness for temp repos
description: Build a test harness for temporary git repos and fake/dummy agent commands.
acceptance_criteria: Core repo/task/run flows can be exercised without real GitHub where possible.

title: Add focused unit tests
description: Cover repo registry, prefix resolution, run selection, status projection, and slug naming.
acceptance_criteria: Pure logic has test coverage and can run with `go test ./...`.

title: Implement optional `orpheus doctor`
description: Add a diagnostic command for git, bd, gh, config, repo registry, and agent profile checks.
acceptance_criteria: Doctor reports missing dependencies and misconfigurations without mutating state.

title: Polish command help and error messages
description: Review Cobra help, usage text, and common error paths.
acceptance_criteria: Main commands explain purpose, args, and next steps clearly.

title: Add example config and agent profiles
description: Provide sample global config, dummy agent, and real-agent profile examples.
acceptance_criteria: Examples demonstrate junior/architect-style named agents and agent context/done contract.

title: Write README quickstart
description: Document install/setup, repo add, task visibility, running agents, completion, PR sync, and merge sync.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh user can follow the README through the happy path.

title: Validate milestone 8 recovery scenarios
description: Force failure cases and verify Orpheus fails safe.
acceptance_criteria: Agent failure, deleted worktree, PR creation failure, missing gh, and closed-unmerged PR are covered.

title: Expand status needs-attention groups
description: Add richer groups for failed, retryable, needs-PR, in-review, and inconsistent states.
acceptance_criteria: Status tells the operator the next command or repair action.

title: Add cheap process status reconciliation
description: Where possible, reconcile recorded process/PID state for local status.
acceptance_criteria: Status can distinguish likely running vs exited/stale process records.

title: Add inconsistent worktree diagnostics
description: Detect dangerous worktree/branch metadata mismatches and refuse unsafe repair.
acceptance_criteria: Errors explain expected path/branch, observed state, and suggested repair.

title: Improve task logs UX
description: Support latest log and attempt listing for a task.
acceptance_criteria: Operator can inspect latest or historical attempt logs easily.

title: Implement retry behavior using stable branch/worktree
description: Allow rerunning failed tasks in the same branch/worktree when safe.
acceptance_criteria: New attempt is recorded; old logs remain; branch/worktree are reused.

title: Implement failed run detection and exit-code capture
description: Record failed runs with ended_at/exit_code and expose them in status.
acceptance_criteria: Non-zero agent exits become failed attempts without corrupting task state.

title: Validate milestone 7 batch scheduling
description: Run multiple dummy-agent tasks with run-ready.
acceptance_criteria: No more than N tasks launch; preview is accurate; already-running/in-review tasks are skipped.

title: Validate duplicate scheduling protection
description: Exercise concurrent or repeated run-ready attempts against the global mutation lock concept.
acceptance_criteria: No task is scheduled twice under normal concurrent invocation scenarios.

title: Implement batch launch through existing task run service
description: Launch selected tasks using the same safe setup path as single-task run.
acceptance_criteria: Batch run reuses eligibility checks, claims, run records, env, and logs.

title: Implement run-ready flags
description: Add --limit, --agent, and --yes behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Limit is enforced; --agent overrides profile for the batch; --yes skips confirmation.

title: Implement run-ready preview and confirmation prompt
description: Show exact tasks to run and require confirmation by default.
acceptance_criteria: Operator sees repo/task/title/agent/branch-worktree summary before launch.

title: Implement run-ready candidate selection and filtering
description: Select ready tasks across repos and filter out active, in-review, and PR-ready tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Candidate list matches task ready minus unsafe/already-in-progress items.

title: Validate milestone 6 full single-task lifecycle
description: Merge a PR and verify Orpheus closes the Beads task.
acceptance_criteria: Bead → worktree → agent → commit → PR → merge → close lifecycle works end-to-end.

title: Implement grouped sync reporting
description: Report synced, skipped, open, merged, errors, and needs-attention groups.
acceptance_criteria: Operator can understand what happened and what remains.

title: Implement `task sync --all` scanner
description: Scan all registered repos for PR-ready tasks and tasks with PR URLs.
acceptance_criteria: Runs creation and polling paths across all repos.

title: Extend single-task sync with PR polling
description: When pr_url exists, poll GitHub and apply deterministic state transitions.
acceptance_criteria: Open PR remains in review; merged PR closes task; errors are reported without destructive changes.

title: Implement task close on merged PR
description: Close the task through TaskBackend when the associated PR is merged.
acceptance_criteria: Merged PRs close Beads task and preserve useful metadata.

title: Define PR state model and mapping
description: Normalize gh output into internal PR states used by sync.
acceptance_criteria: Open, merged, closed-unmerged, missing/inaccessible, and unknown/error are represented.

title: Implement gh CLI PR view/poll provider
description: Wrap `gh pr view` or equivalent to inspect PR state from a PR URL.
acceptance_criteria: Can detect open, merged, closed-unmerged, inaccessible, and error states.

title: Validate milestone 5 single task PR creation
description: Create a real or test GitHub PR from a PR-ready run.
acceptance_criteria: Branch is pushed; PR exists; Beads metadata has pr_url; status shows in review.

title: Expose `task sync <task-id>` for PR creation
description: Wire the single-task sync command for the PR creation path.
acceptance_criteria: Re-running after success is idempotent and does not create duplicate PRs.

title: Store pr_url metadata and update status projection
description: Write `orpheus.pr_url` to task metadata and project in-review status locally.
acceptance_criteria: Presence of pr_url on non-closed task appears as in review.

title: Implement task sync PR creation service
description: Create PR when latest successful run is PR-ready and task has no PR URL.
acceptance_criteria: Does not create PR if no PR-ready run exists or PR URL is already present.

title: Implement git push for task branches
description: Push task branch to origin before PR creation.
acceptance_criteria: Pushes the stored task branch and surfaces auth/remote errors clearly.

title: Implement PR title/body generation
description: Generate PR title/body from task data and latest PR-ready run summary/details.
acceptance_criteria: Body includes task id, title, description/acceptance when available, agent summary/details, and Orpheus note.

title: Implement gh CLI PR create provider
description: Wrap `gh pr create` for MVP GitHub PR creation.
acceptance_criteria: Requires gh auth; returns PR URL; errors are clear.

title: Define PR provider interface
description: Create a small internal interface for PR creation and lookup.
acceptance_criteria: Command code depends on the interface, not raw gh calls.

title: Validate milestone 4 agent completion flow
description: Run a test agent that edits a file and calls agent done.
acceptance_criteria: Context is correct; commit is created; run is PR-ready; status shows needs PR.

title: Add status projection for implementation-complete needs-PR tasks
description: Show tasks with latest successful PR-ready run and no PR URL as needing PR creation.
acceptance_criteria: Status clearly distinguishes running, failed, in-review, and needs-PR cases.

title: Record completion summary/details and PR-ready run state
description: Persist successful run completion with summary, details, ended_at, and pr_ready=true.
acceptance_criteria: PR-ready flag lives on the run record, not the Beads task.

title: Implement Orpheus-owned commit
description: Stage changes and create a standardized commit from task/run summary details.
acceptance_criteria: Agent is not required to commit; no-change cases are handled clearly.

title: Implement `agent done` validation
description: Validate env, cwd, registered worktree, branch, task state, and absence of PR URL.
acceptance_criteria: Mismatches fail loudly before committing or mutating run state.

title: Implement backend-neutral `agent context` renderer
description: Render task description, acceptance criteria/notes, repository info, and execution contract.
acceptance_criteria: Output does not mention Beads or instruct agents to edit task tracker state.

title: Implement agent environment context resolver
description: Resolve ORPHEUS_* environment variables to repo/task/run/worktree context.
acceptance_criteria: Fails clearly when env is missing or inconsistent; does not expose Beads details.

title: Validate milestone 3 single task dispatch
description: Run a dummy agent and verify worktree/env/log behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Dummy agent sees env, correct branch, correct cwd; retry after failed run reuses worktree.

title: Implement `task logs`
description: Show or locate logs for a task's run attempts.
acceptance_criteria: Can show latest log and list available attempts at a basic MVP level.

title: Implement agent process launcher and log capture
description: Launch selected agent in the worktree with ORPHEUS_* environment and log capture.
acceptance_criteria: Agent cwd is worktree; env includes repo/task/worktree/branch; run record/log are created.

title: Implement task run eligibility and claim flow
description: Check task run preconditions and claim/mark in progress through the task backend.
acceptance_criteria: Rejects closed, in-review, active, or PR-ready tasks; stores branch/worktree metadata when created.

title: Implement Git branch/worktree manager
description: Create branches from fetched origin/default_branch and create/recreate worktrees safely.
acceptance_criteria: First setup fetches origin/default; existing branch/worktree are reused; missing safe worktree can be recreated.

title: Implement branch slug and worktree path calculation
description: Derive deterministic branch names and global worktree paths from repo/task data.
acceptance_criteria: Branch includes task id; worktree path lives under global repo data; slugging is deterministic and tested.

title: Implement global mutation lock abstraction
description: Add the conceptual single global mutation lock for state-changing commands.
acceptance_criteria: Mutating services can execute under the lock; implementation details are encapsulated.

title: Implement run record model and file store
description: Persist one-to-many execution attempts under global Orpheus data.
acceptance_criteria: Run records include id, task_id, repo_id, attempt, agent, command_snapshot, status, timestamps, pid/log path.

title: Implement global named agent profile config
description: Load default_agent and named shell-command profiles from global config.
acceptance_criteria: Missing/default/misnamed agent cases produce clear errors; command snapshot can be retrieved for runs.

title: Validate milestone 2 global task visibility
description: Create tasks manually in Beads and verify global Orpheus views.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks from multiple repos appear; status stays local-only; prefix resolution is covered.

title: Implement local-only `status` projection v1
description: Group work by next action without network calls.
acceptance_criteria: Shows ready, blocked, in review, done count, and unknown/needs-attention groups.

title: Implement `task ready` across registered repos
description: Display ready tasks from all registered repos by default.
acceptance_criteria: Ready list matches Beads readiness while preserving repo context.

title: Implement `task list` across registered repos
description: Display tasks from all registered repos by default.
acceptance_criteria: Task list includes repo/prefix, id, title, status, and relevant Orpheus metadata summary.

title: Implement Beads metadata read helpers
description: Read Orpheus metadata keys from task backend without leaking Beads details to higher layers.
acceptance_criteria: Can read branch/worktree/pr_url metadata for status projections.

title: Implement task ID prefix to repo resolver
description: Resolve prefixed task ids to registered repos using the stored Beads prefix.
acceptance_criteria: Known prefixes resolve deterministically; unknown prefixes produce actionable errors.

title: Implement Beads CLI task adapter
description: Implement TaskBackend with `bd` commands for local and global Beads modes.
acceptance_criteria: Can list, show, and ready-query tasks through the registered repo context.

title: Define backend-neutral task model and TaskBackend interface
description: Introduce the narrow task abstraction used by Orpheus commands.
acceptance_criteria: Task model exposes id/title/description/status/metadata; interface supports get/list/ready/claim/metadata/close as needed.

title: Validate milestone 1 repo registration flow
description: Exercise repo registration against temp/local repos and document manual validation steps.
acceptance_criteria: Manual validation for local and global Beads modes passes; duplicate-prefix scenario is covered.

title: Implement `repo list` and `repo beads-dir`
description: Expose registered repos and print the correct Beads working directory for a repo/prefix.
acceptance_criteria: `repo list` shows key repo fields; `repo beads-dir` prints repo path for local mode and managed Beads dir for global mode.

title: Implement interactive `repo add` wizard
description: Add the interactive repository registration flow with detected defaults and user confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: Registers local/global Beads repos; stores confirmed default branch; rejects duplicate prefixes.

title: Implement managed global Beads initialization
description: Create Orpheus-managed Beads directories for repos without local Beads.
acceptance_criteria: Global Beads DB initializes under Orpheus data and produces a usable prefix.

title: Implement Beads mode and prefix detection
description: Use `bd info`/Beads commands to detect existing repo-local Beads and read the prefix.
acceptance_criteria: Local Beads repos are detected; prefix is extracted; failures are surfaced clearly.

title: Implement Git repository inspection
description: Detect whether a path is a Git repo and read remote/default-branch candidates.
acceptance_criteria: Detects remote URL; detects origin/HEAD default branch with current branch fallback.

title: Implement repo registry model and persistence
description: Define repo records and read/write the global registry under Orpheus data.
acceptance_criteria: Repo records include id, name, path, remote, default_branch, beads_mode, and beads_prefix.

title: Bootstrap Go module and CLI command tree
description:
Bootstrap the initial Go CLI project for Orpheus.

Scope:
- Initialize `go.mod` with module path `github.com/hea3ven/orpheus` and Go version `1.24`.
- Use Cobra for CLI command plumbing.
- Keep the command tree root-only for this task. Do not add repo/task/agent/status subcommands yet.
- Create `cmd/orpheus/main.go` as a thin executable entrypoint.
- Put the root command implementation in `internal/cli`.
- Create a minimal Makefile for common local developer commands.
- Do not add version output in this task.

This task should only establish the project skeleton and basic build/test/lint/format entrypoints. Milestone 1 feature commands are added by later tasks.
design:
Implementation notes:
- Prefer a small `internal/cli.NewRootCommand()` or equivalent constructor that returns `*cobra.Command`.
- Keep `main.go` limited to command construction/execution and process exit handling.
- The root command should establish the CLI name, short description, and help text only.
- Avoid adding future command stubs in this task; command groups will be introduced when their milestone tasks need them.
- Keep the Makefile simple and conventional. Suggested targets:
  - `build`: `go build ./cmd/orpheus`
  - `test`: `go test ./...`
  - `fmt`: `gofmt -w` over Go files, or equivalent `go fmt ./...`
  - `lint`: `golangci-lint run`
acceptance_criteria:
- `go.mod` exists with module path `github.com/hea3ven/orpheus` and Go version `1.24`.
- Cobra is added as the CLI framework dependency.
- `cmd/orpheus/main.go` is a thin entrypoint that executes the root command from `internal/cli`.
- Running `go test ./...` succeeds.
- Running `go build ./cmd/orpheus` succeeds.
- Running `go run ./cmd/orpheus --help` renders root command help.
- A minimal `Makefile` exists with at least:
  - `make build`
  - `make test`
  - `make fmt`
  - `make lint`
- `make fmt` formats Go code.
- `make lint` runs `golangci-lint run` and relies on golangci-lint defaults; no `.golangci.yml` is required in this task.
- No repo/task/agent/status subcommands are required yet.
- No version command or `--version` behavior is required yet.

title: Implement Orpheus config/data path resolver and file helpers
description: Resolve XDG config/data paths and create helpers for human-editable YAML/JSON files.
acceptance_criteria: Config/data directories are created on demand; file writes are safe enough for MVP; paths are covered by tests.
